propositions: Register identity as a new exempt ticket-type mirroring session_log/code_review so it is excluded from lifecycle, gates, graph/health, Jira-sync, ready/next_batch/default list.

Add identity at every listed site including the schema enum source of truth, regenerated types, and each inline exempt tuple in composer, reducer, reconciler config, gates, transition_close, and plan-review orchestrator/workflow_ops.

Provide a create path (rebar identity create CLI, rebar.create_identity library, MCP) that mints an identity in one CREATE event carrying name, email, provider mappings, and OpenSSH authorized-keys public-key lines.
Provider vocabulary is an open lowercase-string set and external_id is an opaque provider id never an email; keys embed their key-type with no separate algorithm field.
Implement a self-identity config pointer at .rebar/current_identity as JSON {identity_id}, written by identity use and create --self.

resolve_current_identity(repo_root keyword-only) resolves via the pointer file, else case-insensitive git user.email match, returning None for all fallbacks (unset email, subprocess error, zero/multiple matches, dangling pointer) with a warning on ambiguity.
